Portfolio

Key Projects.

01
Payment Processing Service
Java · Spring Boot · REST API · PostgreSQL
  • Built a backend payment service simulating core banking operations — account creation, fund transfers, and full transaction history — with fully ACID-compliant logic in PostgreSQL.
  • Implemented idempotency keys on payment endpoints to safely handle duplicate requests; wrote integration tests to validate behaviour under load.
  • Applied OOP analysis and design patterns with clean code principles; separated domain, service, and API layers for maintainability and testability.
02
Group Expense Tracker
Java · Spring Boot · REST API · MySQL
  • Developed a Splitwise-style group expense backend with a custom debt-simplification algorithm to minimise total transactions between group members.
  • Applied clean microservice separation — settlement logic, user management, and API layer independently deployable — demonstrating structured thinking in complex system design.
  • Designed well-structured REST API endpoints following industry standards; wrote unit and integration tests covering all core business logic.
03
Industrial Data Pipeline & Real-Time Dashboard
Node-RED · InfluxDB · Grafana · Linux · Master Thesis
  • Independently designed and delivered an end-to-end industrial data pipeline and real-time monitoring dashboard as part of Master's thesis.
  • Full ownership from requirements definition through to user handover and documentation — covering system architecture, implementation, testing, and deployment on Linux.
